description: Benchmark reference fixture for winter signed component totals with negative heat-flow balance.
method: Energy Calculation Parity / Annual 8760 Energy Balance Signed Components
sourceReference: Internal benchmark reference values derived from constant signed hourly component loads; no external parity claim.
assumptions: Magnitude component fields are aggregated as non-negative kWh.
Net component fields preserve the sign of hourly balance values.
notes: This fixture verifies signed transmission, ventilation and ground totals only.
